content.query:
-- Main ODS Table (without raw_payload)
CREATE TABLE ODS.ODS_ASANA_GOALS (
    goal_gid NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    goal_name NVARCHAR(255),
    owner_gid NVARCHAR(50),
    owner_name NVARCHAR(255),
    resource_type NVARCHAR(50),
    is_deleted BIT DEFAULT 0,
    load_timestamp DATETIME2
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(goal_gid),  
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX  -- Optimized for analytics
);

-- Separate Table for Storing raw JSON
CREATE TABLE ODS.ODS_ASANA_GOALS_RAW (
    goal_gid NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,  
    raw_payload NVARCHAR(MAX),
    CONSTRAINT PK_ASANA_GOALS_RAW PRIMARY KEY NONCLUSTERED (goal_gid) NOT ENFORCED  -- Add NOT ENFORCED
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(goal_gid),  
    HEAP  -- HEAP storage is required for NVARCHAR(MAX)
);
